raw_block:
–1. Place of the first encampment of the Israelites west of the 
Jordan RiverJos 4:19;9:6;10:6,43;14:6
  .Monument erected in, to commemorate the passage across the Jordan 
River by the people of IsraelJos 4:19-24
  .Circumcision renewed atJos 5:2-9
  .Passover kept atJos 5:10,11
  .Manna ceased at, after the PassoverJos 5:12
  .Quarries atJud 3:19
  .Eglon, king of Moab, resides and is slain atJud 3:14-26
  .A judgment seat, where Israel, in that district, came to be judged 
by Samuel1Sa 7:16
  .Saul proclaimed king over all Israel at1Sa 11:15
  .An altar built at, and sacrifice offered1Sa 11:15;13:4-15;15:6-23
  .Agag, king of the Amalekites, slain at, by Samuel1Sa 
15:33
  .Tribe of Judah assembles at, to proceed to the east side of the 
Jordan River to conduct King David back after the defeat of Absalom2Sa 
19:14,15,40-43
  .A school of the prophets at2Ki 4:38-40
  .Prophecies concerningHo 4:15;9:15;12:11;Am 4:4;5:5
–2. A royal city in Canaan
  .Conquered by JoshuaJos 12:23
